{{Quote|I want the Grinning Liar--Something that actually runs.|Chak|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 16">[[Legacy (2006) 16|''Legacy'' (2006) 16]]</ref>}}
The '''''Grinning Liar''''' was a [[YX-1980 space transport]] vessel employed by [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] [[Chak (Wookiee)|Chak]] and [[Kee (Devaronian)|Kee]].

==History==
In [[137 ABY]], Chak rented his ship to [[Jariah Syn]] and [[Deliah Blue]], but they were caught by the [[Feeorin/Legends|Feeorin]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Rav]], who turned them over to the [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] and confiscated the ''Grinning Liar''. Sometime later Chak, Kee, Jariah Syn and [[Cade Skywalker]] sneaked into the ''[[Crimson Axe]]'' and after a short fight Rav reluctantly returned the ''Grinning Liar'' as Chak and Kee's property. The ship was last seen on [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]] Spaceport where Chak told Cade he would lose himself in the galaxy for a while advising Cade to do the same.

Several [[Standard month/Legends|months]] later, the ''Grinning Liar'' joined a [[Emergency evac fleet|massive fleet]] of civilian volunteers that aided the [[Galactic Alliance Remnant]] in the [[Evacuation of Dac|evacuation]] of the planet [[Dac/Legends|Dac]], which had been [[Final Protocol|poisoned]] by the [[One Sith]] in an effort to eliminate all life on the planet.
